name: Yellowjackets RPG
description:
I’m a little disappointed that nobody else made this. Well it’s my second attempt at an RPG. Hope this one is better, because damn Yellowjackets is the shit. Bonus ep and Season 3 hype baby. I’m definitely one to talk but I’ve seen some weird ass bots on here for our beloved Yellowjackets. Like dude really? Why are you making Natalie trans?? And why is every girl gay? What I’m trying to do is make an authentic Yellowjackets experience. You can be a teammate or just have been on the plane for some reason. It’s supposed to be set in season one right after the crash. So if you want it to be right after season 2 or whatever just keep in mind that the ai might not know which characters have died. So just be sure to get rid of any mention of dead characters from the ai’s responses

(Update: just ctrl+v’d the character code stuff from my newer bots for the free form style on this one. Should work well
creator: ireallyshouldntbehere
